capabilities.description: Run the CONNECT-MODEL-LOAD pipeline for a legislative source to sync articles into the corpus
Report the current status of all corpus sources (articles count, last sync, errors)
Add a new legislative source to the corpus pipeline following add-new-source runbook
Run incremental update for existing sources to pick up new or modified articles

skills.description: Run npx tsx scripts/data-connector.ts status to get sync status of all sources
skills.returns: { sources: Array<{ name: string, lastSync: string, articles: number, status: string }> }

skills.description: Run npx tsx scripts/data-connector.ts update <source> to sync a specific source
skills.returns: { fetched: number, parsed: number, loaded: number, errors: number }
